channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Deaf actor Kaylee Hottle, 18, dies in car accident after starring in Godzilla vs Kong
item.description: Kaylee Hottle, a deaf actor best known for her role as Jia in the 2021 film Godzilla vs Kong, has died following a car accident at the age of 18. Her father, Joshua Hottle, confirmed the tragic news v...

item.title: Perth paediatrician-turned-ISIS fighter reportedly imprisoned in Iraq after decade-long disappearance
item.description: Tareq Kamleh, a former Perth paediatrician who joined the Islamic State (IS) and became known as 'Dr Jihad,' is allegedly still alive and being held in an Iraqi jail nearly a decade after his death wa...

item.title: Kenyan Woman Completes Degree While Pregnant, Celebrates with Daughter
item.description: A Kenyan woman, Mwende, has graduated with her newborn daughter, Imani, by her side, marking a significant milestone in her life. The graduate shared photos from her graduation ceremony, highlighting ...

item.title: Safal Kiswahili Prize Announces Shortlisted Works for 10th Anniversary Celebration
item.description: The Safal Kiswahili Prize for African Literature has shortlisted seven manuscripts across fiction, poetry, and short story categories for its 10th anniversary celebration on July 24 in Dar es Salaam. ...

item.title: IIT Roorkee Clarifies Internal Advisory on Political Discussions Amid CJP Protests
item.description: The Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Roorkee issued an internal advisory warning students and staff against participating in political discussions or activities without prior permission, which has...

item.title: Senator John Fetterman Considers Party Switch Over Israel Policy Concerns
item.description: U.S. Senator John Fetterman (D-PA) is facing growing speculation about potential party switching due to his increasing divergence from Democratic priorities, particularly regarding Israel policy. The ...

item.title: Senate Candidate Faces Criticism Over Absentee Record and Taxpayer Benefits
item.description: Iowa Republican congressional candidate Ashley Hinson criticized Democratic Senate contender Josh Turek for allegedly skipping legislative votes to attend fundraisers and receive $20,100 in taxpayer-f...

item.title: South Carolina Senator's Sister Launches Campaign for Late Brother's Seat
item.description: Darline Lettie Graham Nordone, appointed as South Carolina's interim U.S. Senator following her brother Lindsey Graham's unexpected death, has sparked controversy with her campaign strategies. The app...

item.title: Montreal Police Make Arrests and Seizures in Passport Forgery Operation
item.description: Montreal police conducted a major operation targeting passport forgery, resulting in multiple arrests and the seizure of forged documents. The operation, which involved collaboration between local and...

item.title: Andrea Johnson Denies Arrest of Lt-Gen Khumalo Was to Stall Investigations
item.description: Investigating Directorate Against Corruption (Idac) head Andrea Johnson has firmly denied allegations that the corruption case against police crime intelligence head Lt-Gen Dumisani Khumalo was politi...

item.title: Barangay Health Workers Push for Magna Carta Recognition in SONA 2026
item.description: Barangay health workers (BHWs) from Metro Manila have submitted an appeal letter to President Ferdinand Marcos Jr., urging him to prioritize the enactment of a Magna Carta during his upcoming State of...

item.title: Iranian Interior Minister Holds Key Talks on Security and Bilateral Ties with Pakistani Leadership
item.description: In a significant diplomatic engagement, Iran's Interior Minister Eskandar Momeni visited Pakistan and met with Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and Chief of Defence Forces Field Marshal Asim Munir in Isl...

item.title: Senator Nwoko Appeals Court Ruling on Okowa's Senate Bid
item.description: Senator Ned Nwoko (APC-Delta) has announced his intention to appeal a Federal High Court ruling that dismissed his legal challenge against Ifeanyi Okowa’s APC senatorial candidacy. The court ruled tha...

item.title: Tanzania Expands Electricity Access with Mtwara Power Transmission Project
item.description: Tanzania has officially started building a major power transmission line connecting Masasi Switching Station to Newala District, marking a key step in improving electricity access across the southern ...

item.title: Wetang'ula Promotes Ruto's Re-election, Highlights Infrastructure and Anti-Discrimination Policies

item.title: Defense Challenges Matibag's Knowledge of Sara Duterte's Alleged Threats During Impeachment Trial
item.description: The defense team of Vice President Sara Duterte focused on cross-examining National Bureau of Investigation Director Melvin Matibag during her impeachment trial, emphasizing his lack of personal knowl...

item.title: Pakistan PM Shehbaz and Iran's Momeni Discuss Regional De-escalation
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif met with Iranian Interior Minister Eskandar Momeni to address regional tensions, emphasizing Pakistan's role as a mediator between Iran and the US. The discussion focused...

item.title: Albanese attends exclusive dinner with business leaders and son of Chinese developer
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese attended an intimate $1 million fundraiser at the upscale Point Piper residence of Felix Lee, son of a Chinese developer, on Monday night. The event, organised by Lee, ...
